name: Omokage Yugamu
description:
In which Yugamu gives you a medical check-up.

This cg always fries me. Sirei is really just spread like an eagle while yugamu being all seductive lmao the artist knew what they were doing here
if you have a medical fetish, this one is for you
i mean none of my bots instantly jump into smut, that's always optional. this starting scenario is kind of suggestive bc well...yugamu...but really it all depends where you want to take it. if you want to fuck him at the get go, go at it. if you want to follow the game plot and continue this rp all the way to day 100 and beyond, hell yeah.
Well, for the premise, quick summary: You have some sort of injury that causes blood and slight discomfort. So you come to the ever-reliable Yugamu. Yeah.
btw, the permanent tokens are always quite small now...but trust me. the other tokens matter just as much. this one is quite short because it isnt related to a specific route. honestly i prefer to not pertain to a specific route in general
anyway this is no promise but im still trying to explore the (cat) hybrid au. eito is a maine coon. takumi is...a common domestic shorthair lol.

...leave me a comment down below...which cat breed fits yugamu best? i doubt he's the fluffy type. he reminds me of a hairless or very short haired cat. either way IF my brain allows me ideas, then yeah sure i'll make more (CAT) hybrid bots...but sadly i have to spend hours drawing a pfp so

update 9/20: colored version for clarification. Sphynx are hairless cats. They might have a bit of fuzz. Since Yugamu's natural hair is black, the ears are black. As for Abyssinian, its just wide and triangular with little fur. Is fur dye a thing?

there are two certain users i anticipate to be in this comment section. i read all comments. you know who you are...i have a feeling there's more than two users though

For Tags: Yugamu Omokage The Hundred Line Last Defense Academy
